codeActions.title: Add 'use client' directive
codeActions.description: Adds 'use client' directive at the top of the file to mark it as a Client Component.

codeActions.title: Add 'use server' directive
codeActions.description: Adds 'use server' directive to mark the file or function as a Server Action.

codeActions.title: Convert to Server Component
codeActions.description: Removes 'use client' directive and converts client-specific code to server-compatible patterns.

codeActions.title: Convert to Client Component
codeActions.description: Adds 'use client' directive and ensures the component uses client-side patterns.

codeActions.title: Extract Server Action
codeActions.description: Extracts inline server action into a separate 'use server' function.

codeActions.title: Add generateMetadata export
codeActions.description: Adds a generateMetadata function for dynamic SEO metadata.

codeActions.title: Add generateStaticParams export
codeActions.description: Adds a generateStaticParams function for static generation of dynamic routes.

codeActions.title: Wrap with Suspense boundary
codeActions.description: Wraps the selected async component with a React Suspense boundary and loading fallback.

codeActions.title: Add loading.tsx file
codeActions.description: Creates a loading.tsx file in the current route segment directory for streaming.

codeActions.title: Add error.tsx file
codeActions.description: Creates an error.tsx file in the current route segment directory for error handling.

codeActions.title: Convert getServerSideProps to App Router
codeActions.description: Converts Pages Router getServerSideProps to App Router async Server Component with fetch.

codeActions.title: Convert API Route to Route Handler
codeActions.description: Converts Pages Router API route (req, res) to App Router Route Handler with NextRequest/NextResponse.

codeActions.title: Add revalidation to fetch
codeActions.description: Adds next.revalidate or next.tags option to an existing fetch call.

codeActions.title: Optimize Image component
codeActions.description: Converts HTML tag to Next.js component with optimization props.

codeActions.title: Add middleware matcher
codeActions.description: Adds or updates the config.matcher export in middleware.ts for route matching.

codeActions.title: Convert to dynamic import
codeActions.description: Converts a static import to a dynamic import using next/dynamic for code splitting.

codeActions.title: Add route segment config
codeActions.description: Adds route segment configuration exports (dynamic, revalidate, runtime, etc.).

edit.insertText:
export const dynamic = 'auto';
export const revalidate = false;

codeActions.title: Organize Next.js imports
codeActions.description: Organizes imports with next/* imports first, then third-party, then local imports.
